originalTitle: Smosh vs. T-Pain In Rhythm Heaven Groove
content: #NintendoPartner | T-Pain, Angela, Courtney, and Chanse get their groove on! Learn more about Rhythm Heaven Groove, a new game for the Nintendo Switch system. https://ninten.do/6009v0IkN SUBSCRIBE: https://smo.sh/Sub2SmoshGames WEAR OUR JOKES: https://smosh.com WHO YOU SEE Courtney Miller // https://www.instagram.com/co_mill/ Chanse McCrary // https://www.instagram.com/phatchanse/ Angela Giarratana // https://www.instagram.com/angelagiovanagiarratana/ T-Pain // https://www.instagram.com/tpain/ WHO YOU DON’T SEE (usually) Director: Anders Norberg Editor: Rayne Darling Channel Director, Smosh Games: Spencer Agnew Producer, Smosh Games: Anders Norberg Production Designer: Cassie Vance Art Director: Adrian Sheen, Erin Kuschner, Josie Bellerby Assistant Art Director: Abigail Schmidt, Courtney Chapman Prop Master: Bridgette Baron, Emilie Anderson Stage Manager: Alex Aguilar HMUA: Gabriela Vega Director of Audio: Scott Neff Audio Utility: Dina Ramli Director of Photography: Eric Wann, Brennan Iketani Videographer: Eric Wann, James Hull Camera Operator: Simone Williams, Macy Armstrong Assistant Director: Alexcina Figueroa Executive Vice President of Production: Amanda Barnes Director of Production: Alexcina Figueroa Production Manager: Jonathan Hyon, Tyler M. Kennedy Production Coordinator: Oliver Wehlander, Zianne Hoover Production Assistant: Caroline Smith Director of Post Production: Luke Baker DIT/Lead AE: Matt Duran DIT/AE: Beni Kimuene Post Production Coordinator: Ariana Martinez Director of IT: Tim Baker IT & Equipment Coordinator: Lopati Ho Chee Sound Editor: Gareth Hird Director of Design: Ness Cardano Senior Motion & Branding Designer: Christie Hauck Senior Graphic Designer: Jay Taylor Graphic Designer: Monica Ravitch Director of Channel Operations: Lizzy Jones Channel Operations Manager: Audrey Carganilla Channel Operations Coordinator: Sabrina Lieberman Director of Social Media: Erica Noboa Social Media Associate Producer: Peter Ditzler Social Media Manager: Kim Wilborn Social Media Coordinator: Margaux Bernales Social Editor: Vida Robbins Merchandising Manager: Mallory Myers Brand Partnership Manager: Chloe Mays Brand Partnerships Coordinating Producer: Liz Kummer Operations Manager: Marshall A. Pease Operations Coordinator: Sara Faltersack Financial Operations Specialist: Natalie Lewis Talent Coordinator: Danielle Moses People & Culture Manager: Katie Fink People & Culture Coordinator: Hannah Merritt CEO: Alessandra Catanese Executive Producers: Anthony Padilla, Ian Hecox CCO: Cory Midgarden EVP of Programming & Development: Kiana Parker Producer, Special Projects: Rachel Collis Executive Coordinator: Katelyn Hempstead Executive Assistant: Jackie Reilly OTHER SMOSHES: Smosh: https://smo.sh/Sub2Smosh Smosh Pit: https://smo.sh/Sub2SmoshPit SmoshCast: https://smo.sh/Sub2SmoshCast Smosh Alike: https://bit.ly/SubToSmoshAlike FOLLOW US: TikTok: https://smo.sh/TikTok Instagram: https://instagram.com/smosh Facebook: https://facebook.com/smosh

chineseContent: #任天堂合作伙伴 | T-Pain、Angela、Courtney 和 Chanse 尽情发挥！了解有关 Nintendo Switch 系统新游戏 Rhythm Heaven Groove 的更多信息。 https://ninten.do/6009v0IkN 订阅：https://smo.sh/Sub2SmoshGames 开玩笑：https://smosh.com 你看到的是谁 Courtney Miller // https://www.instagram.com/co_mill/ Chanse McCrary // https://www.instagram.com/phatchanse/ Angela Giarratana // https://www.instagram.com/angelagiovanagiarratana/ T-Pain // https://www.instagram.com/tpain/ 你看不到的人（通常） 导演：Anders Norberg 编辑：Rayne Darling 频道总监，Smosh Games：Spencer Agnew 制片人，Smosh Games：Anders Norberg 制作设计师：Cassie Vance 艺术总监：Adrian Sheen、Erin Kuschner、Josie Bellerby 助理艺术总监：阿比盖尔·施密特、考特尼·查普曼 道具大师：布里吉特·巴伦、埃米莉·安德森 舞台监督：亚历克斯·阿吉拉尔 HMUA：加布里埃拉·维加 音频总监：斯科特·内夫 音频实用程序：迪娜·拉姆利 摄影指导：埃里克·万恩、布伦南·伊克塔尼 摄像师：埃里克·万恩、詹姆斯·赫尔 摄像师：西蒙·威廉姆斯、梅西·阿姆斯特朗 助理导演：阿莱克西娜·菲格罗亚 制作执行副总裁：阿曼达·巴恩斯 制作总监：阿莱克西纳Figueroa 制作经理：Jonathan Hyon、Tyler M. Kennedy 制作协调员：Oliver Wehlander、Zianne Hoover 制作助理：Caroline Smith 后期制作总监：Luke Baker DIT/Lead AE：Matt Duran DIT/AE：Beni Kimuene 后期制作协调员：Ariana Martinez IT 总监：Tim Baker IT 和设备协调员：Lopati Ho Chee 声音编辑：Gareth Hird 设计总监：Ness Cardano 高级动作与品牌设计师：Christie Hauck 高级平面设计师：Jay Taylor 平面设计师：Monica Ravitch 渠道运营总监：Lizzy Jones Channe
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
